query: SELECT id, name, store_id, category_id, price, is_active FROM products WHERE store_id = 1 AND (name LIKE '%slush%' OR name LIKE '%Slush%' OR name LIKE '%SLUSH%') AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT id, name, store_id, category_id, price, is_active FROM products WHERE store_id = 1 AND (name LIKE '%slush%' OR name LIKE '%Slush%' OR name LIKE '%SLUSH%') AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY name;
